{{ po.po_number }} {{ po.po_date|date:"d M Y"|default:"—" }} {{ po.currency }} {{ po.total_amount|default:"—" }} {{ po.status }} {{ po.buyer_name|default:"—"|truncatechars:20 }} {{ po.department|default:"—"|truncatechars:20 }}
{% endif %} {# ── Invoices ── #} {% if invoices %}

{% for inv in invoices %} {% endfor %}

{{ inv.invoice_number|default:"—" }} {{ inv.invoice_date|date:"d M Y"|default:"—" }} {{ inv.currency|default:"" }} {{ inv.total_amount|default:"—" }} {% if inv.status == "RECONCILED" %}{{ inv.status }} {% elif inv.status == "EXTRACTED" or inv.status == "VALIDATED" %}{{ inv.status }} {% elif inv.status == "FAILED" or inv.status == "INVALID" %}{{ inv.status }} {% else %}{{ inv.status }}{% endif %} {{ inv.po_number|default:"—" }}
{% endif %} {# ── GRNs ── #} {% if grns %}

{% for grn in grns %} {% endfor %}
